description_long: This is a Lenovo laptop with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The screen displays a vivid landscape image, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard is backlit with a striking red color, and the touchpad is outlined in red as well, giving it a modern, gaming-oriented appearance. The rear of the laptop features a subtle Lenovo logo on the top left corner of the lid. Multiple ports are visible along the sides, suggesting robust connectivity options. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and metal, with a glass screen and rubberized feet for stability.
description: A black Lenovo laptop with a red backlit keyboard, vivid display, and multiple side ports, designed with a modern, angular aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a landscape image, red backlit keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, visible ports, and the open screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with the Lenovo logo and subtle texturing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard, touchpad, and additional ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A Lenovo logo is visible on the top left corner of the laptop lid, in black text, blending subtly with the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a landscape wallpaper image.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a red backlight, includes a function row and a numeric keypad.
attribute_sticker_placement: There are two stickers on the right palm rest area, one rectangular and one square, featuring logos and text.
